description: FrogDB server metrics dashboard - auto-generated from metric definitions

panels.description: Binary version of this node (info gauge, always 1)
panels.title: Frogdb Binary Version

panels.description: Number of currently blocked clients per shard
panels.title: Frogdb Blocked Clients

panels.description: Number of keys being watched for blocking per shard
panels.title: Frogdb Blocked Keys

panels.description: Total blocked clients redirected with -MOVED after slot migration
panels.title: Frogdb Blocked Migration Moved Total

panels.description: Whether nodes report different binary versions (1 = mixed, 0 = uniform)
panels.title: Frogdb Cluster Mixed Version

panels.description: Cumulative user CPU time in seconds (monotonic; sampled from getrusage)
panels.title: Cpu User

panels.description: Cumulative system CPU time in seconds (monotonic; sampled from getrusage)
panels.title: Cpu System

panels.description: Total keys sampled by the eviction policy
panels.title: Frogdb Eviction Samples Total

panels.description: Server information (constant 1, labeled with version and mode)
panels.title: Frogdb Info

panels.description: Number of keys with expiry set per shard
panels.title: Frogdb Keys With Expiry

panels.description: Total keyspace notifications dropped (coordinator channel full)
panels.title: Frogdb Keyspace Notifications Dropped Total

panels.description: from the band tracker at scrape time
panels.title: Frogdb Latency Band Requests Total

panels.description: Lua script execution duration in seconds
panels.title: Frogdb Lua Scripts Duration
Frogdb Lua Scripts Cache Hits Total
Frogdb Lua Scripts Cache Misses Total

panels.description: Resident set size memory in bytes
panels.title: Frogdb Memory Rss Bytes

panels.description: Currently used memory in bytes per shard
panels.title: Frogdb Memory Used Bytes

panels.description: Peak memory usage in bytes per shard
panels.title: Frogdb Memory Peak Bytes

panels.description: Number of active pub/sub channels per shard
panels.title: Frogdb Pubsub Channels

panels.description: Number of active pub/sub patterns per shard
panels.title: Frogdb Pubsub Patterns

panels.description: Total warnings for pub/sub resources approaching per-shard limits
panels.title: Frogdb Pubsub Shard Limit Warnings Total

panels.description: Number of shards involved in scatter-gather
panels.title: Frogdb Scatter Gather Shards

panels.description: Memory usage per shard in bytes
panels.title: Frogdb Shard Memory Bytes

panels.description: Whether a snapshot is currently in progress
panels.title: Frogdb Snapshot In Progress

panels.description: Monotonic epoch of the most recent snapshot attempt
panels.title: Frogdb Snapshot Epoch

panels.description: Timestamp of last successful snapshot (unix seconds)
panels.title: Frogdb Snapshot Last Timestamp

panels.description: Total operations discarded during split-brain recovery
panels.title: Frogdb Split Brain Ops Discarded Total

panels.description: Whether an unprocessed split-brain log file exists (1 = yes, 0 = no)
panels.title: Frogdb Split Brain Recovery Pending

panels.description: Number of tasks instrumented by this monitor in the last interval
panels.title: Frogdb Task Instrumented Count

panels.description: Number of instrumented tasks dropped in the last interval
panels.title: Frogdb Task Dropped Count

panels.description: Total task poll duration in seconds over the last interval
panels.title: Frogdb Task Total Poll Duration

panels.description: Total time tasks spent scheduled (runnable but waiting) in seconds over the last interval
panels.title: Frogdb Task Total Scheduled Duration

panels.description: Total time tasks spent idle in seconds over the last interval
panels.title: Frogdb Task Total Idle Duration

panels.description: Mean task poll duration in seconds over the last interval
panels.title: Frogdb Task Mean Poll Duration

panels.description: Total keys demoted to the cold tier instead of evicted
panels.title: Frogdb Tiered Demotions Total

panels.description: Total bytes freed by demoting keys to the cold tier
panels.title: Frogdb Tiered Bytes Demoted Total

panels.description: Number of queued commands in transactions
panels.title: Frogdb Transactions Queued Commands

panels.description: Whether a specific version gate is active (1) or suppressed (0)
panels.title: Frogdb Version Gate Active

panels.description: Timestamp of last WAL flush (unix milliseconds)
panels.title: Frogdb Wal Last Flush Timestamp

panels.description: Total WAL entries dropped in failed flushes (permanent losses)
panels.title: Frogdb Wal Lost Ops Total

panels.description: Total estimated bytes dropped in failed WAL flushes
panels.title: Frogdb Wal Lost Bytes Total

panels.description: Whether the most recent WAL flush attempt succeeded (1 = ok)
panels.title: Frogdb Wal Last Flush Ok

panels.description: Total store mutations rolled back after a WAL append failure
panels.title: Frogdb Wal Rollbacks Total

title: FrogDB Overview
